positive: A whimsical and stylized depiction of a constellation forming a group of stylized forest animals (fox, deer, bear, rabbit) connected by glowing celestial lines. The animals are rendered in a clean, minimal line-art style with solid, flat color silhouettes (deep indigo, emerald green, gold accents). The background should be a gradient of deep midnight blue and cosmic purple, subtly speckled with white dots representing stars. Focus on strong, central composition and clear, distinct silhouettes. Style: Pacific Northwest tattoo flash meets celestial blueprint, vector art aesthetics. Lighting: Soft, glowing backlighting emphasizing the glow lines. Aspect Ratio: Square, high contrast, ready for apparel printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, gradient noise, messy lines, realism, photograph, dirty, cluttered, sketch, watercolor, highly detailed fur, messy background
